title: A Beautiful Island Village
content: While exploring the coast, Ethan discovered a small island village connected to the mainland by a short ferry ride. White houses lined narrow streets overlooking crystal-clear water. Fishing boats rested quietly in the harbor while residents chatted outside cafés and shops. Unlike larger tourist destinations, the village felt calm and authentic. Ethan spent the day wandering through the streets, enjoying fresh seafood, and photographing the scenery. The peaceful atmosphere made it difficult to leave. Even years later, he still remembered the village as one of the most charming places he had visited.
